zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期偏弱震荡
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格处于1661.5美元，较日内高点1672.71略低，呈现小幅回调走势。结合20日简单均线(SMA20)1682.60美元，价格仍位于均线下方，短期偏弱，市场多空力量处于均衡状态，需关注均线压制作用。  

MACD显示快线为5.52109，处于零轴附近，虽未提供信号线，但暗示动能趋于中性偏弱。缺乏RSI数据限制了超买超卖判断，但结合当前价格与均线关系，短线空头压力略占优势，短期市场可能延续震荡下行格局。  

支撑位初步关注1656.3美元日内低点，其下方可参考1645-1640美元区域作为次级支撑。阻力位则在1672-1682美元区间，尤其SMA20附近可能形成明显抛压，突破阻力需观察成交量放大情况。  

交易策略上，短线可考虑逢高轻仓减持或观望，激进者可在支撑位附近小幅低吸，止损控制在1640美元下方。中线投资者建议等待价格回到均线附近企稳并伴随量能改善后，再布局多头，降低短期波动风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 1661.5, down 0.50% over the past 24 hours, with intraday movement confined between 1656.31 and 1672.71. The short-term structure remains cautious as price continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 1682.61. This positioning suggests sellers retain a modest advantage, although the relatively narrow daily range indicates that bearish momentum is not especially aggressive and consolidation conditions are developing.

The moving average relationship is currently the most informative indicator available. With ETH/USD trading beneath the SMA(20), the market is signaling short-term weakness and a reluctance to sustain rallies. At the same time, the MACD reading of 5.52 remains positive, implying that underlying momentum has not completely deteriorated. The absence of a signal-line comparison limits confirmation, but the positive MACD value suggests downside pressure may be moderating rather than accelerating.

From a price-action perspective, immediate support is located around the session low near 1656, followed by a stronger psychological support area around 1650. A decisive break below these levels could expose additional downside risk toward lower consolidation zones. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 1673, corresponding to the recent high, while the SMA(20) around 1683 represents a more significant barrier. A sustained move above that average would improve the short-term technical outlook.

Traders may consider a neutral-to-cautiously bearish stance while price remains below 1683. Conservative participants could wait for either a confirmed breakout above resistance or a clear rejection from current levels before establishing positions. Short-term buyers may look for stabilization around support, while momentum traders could favor bullish setups only after reclaiming the moving average. Risk management remains essential, as current conditions suggest range-bound trading with potential for a directional move once key levels are breached.
